offer: For accounting firms processing 10–50 tax returns/month, manual tax return generation causes delays in filing and increased client dissatisfaction. We simplify the generation and filing of tax returns instead of manual tax preparation software.
problem: Manual tax return generation and filing is time-consuming and error-prone.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on tax workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Participate in community forums for accounting tools
try_it: Let users try filing capabilities on 1-3 tax returns
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with a clear CTA
Produce a demo video showing the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
